issues.message: Missing optional columns (will be treated as empty): ['description']
3,163 rows have invalid targeting value (must be 'True' or 'False', title case): {'TRUE': 2913, 'FALSE': 250}

44 targeting rows have intended_target_end < guide_end by ≤ 50 bp (minor boundary effect)

318 targeting rows have intended_target coords that do not span all guides in their guide-prefix group — 106 groups affected (likely per-guide assignment instead of per-group); e.g. ['ARL8A', 'AXL', 'BCKDHA', 'CARM1', 'COTL1']
description column is present but all empty — recommend filling with guide group name (guide_id stripped of trailing _N)
